name: Data Breach
description: A data breach has occurred affecting personal data. Simulate the contractual consequences including notification obligations, liability exposure, and indemnification triggers.

parameters.name: records_affected
parameters.description: Number of records/individuals affected by the breach

parameters.name: data_types
parameters.description: Types of data compromised (e.g., PII, PHI, financial)

parameters.name: discovery_date
parameters.description: When the breach was discovered (relative to contract timeline)

analysis_guidance: Focus on: (1) Data protection and privacy clauses — what obligations are triggered by the breach? (2) Notification requirements — who must be notified, within what timeframe? (3) Indemnification — does this breach trigger indemnification obligations? Who bears the cost? (4) Liability caps — are there caps on liability for data breaches? Are they adequate given the scale? (5) Insurance requirements — does the contract require cyber insurance? (6) Termination rights — does this breach give either party termination rights? (7) Subprocessor/vendor obligations — if the breach originated from a subprocessor, what flows down? (8) Remediation obligations — what remedial steps are contractually required?
